title: cyclosorus martinii
intro: Cyclosorus martinii is a plant species belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly known as the maiden's hair fern. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus martinii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
